heading: Overview
body:
Prisma is an open source Object Relational Mapper (ORM) for Node.js. It supports both JavaScript
and TypeScript, but it is primarily used with TypeScript to help you write readable and type-safe
code.

> **Warning:** 
>
> MongoDB Support for Prisma ORM v7
>
> The MongoDB Node.js driver does not yet support Prisma ORM version 7. Use the latest
> available version 6.x release of Prisma ORM when working with MongoDB.
